items.title: Vatican excommunicates followers of global Catholic sect
items.summary: Around 600,000 followers of the Society of Saint Pius X, a Catholic sect, are affected.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: See How Europe’s Heat Waves Melted the Alps’ Glaciers
items.summary: The snowfall from last winter disappeared a month sooner than usual, after two early hot spells. Huge volumes of exposed ice are now starting to vanish.
